name: Security Advisory
about: Report a security vulnerability
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

## Security Issue Type
- [ ] Code injection vulnerability
- [ ] Authentication bypass
- [ ] Data leakage
- [ ] Privilege escalation
- [ ] Denial of service
- [ ] PII exposure
- [ ] Omega threshold manipulation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (CVSS 9.0-10.0)
- [ ] High (CVSS 7.0-8.9)
- [ ] Medium (CVSS 4.0-6.9)
- [ ] Low (CVSS 0.1-3.9)

## Description
Detailed description of the vulnerability.

## Steps to Reproduce
How to reproduce the vulnerability.

## Impact
What is the potential impact?

## Affected Components
Which components are affected?
- [ ] Stage 1: DECONSTRUCT
- [ ] Stage 2: PATTERN DISTILL
- [ ] Stage 3: MUTATE
- [ ] Stage 4: REBUILD
- [ ] Governance (SNP, Kill Switch)
- [ ] Atomic Layer
- [ ] Other: ___

## Proof of Concept
If available, provide a proof of concept.

## Suggested Fix
If known, suggest a fix for the vulnerability.

## Disclosure Timeline
Please indicate if this is a coordinated disclosure.

---
**Note:** For critical vulnerabilities, please reach out to security@neuroloom.io directly.
